verdict: The two best current EMG gains do compose into a subject-sensitivity improvement on this repaired scaffold: `brux2` crosses the subject threshold (`0.480` -> `0.808`) and `n3` drops sharply (`0.439` -> `0.068`), but `brux1` gets worse (`0.180` -> `0.112`), so the gain is real but not a clean across-bruxism fix.
